home.guestIntro: Anonymous polling and elections. Create an account to vote on published polls; apply for Creator access to publish your own.

findPolls.title: Find polls and view results
findPolls.description: Search by title, creator, zipcode, candidate, or type. Open a poll to vote or jump to its results page.

creatorDashboard.title: Creator dashboard
creatorDashboard.description: See your polls in draft, published, and closed states. Create new polls or edit existing drafts.

newPoll.title: Start a new poll
newPoll.description: Build an Election, Questionnaire, or Referendum and send respondent links once it goes live.

becomeCreator.title: Become a Creator
becomeCreator.description: Apply to host your own polls in specific zipcodes. An admin reviews your request and grants access.

adminDashboard.title: Admin dashboard
adminDashboard.description: Review pending Creator requests, manage creators and their polls.

becomeAdmin.title: Become an Admin
becomeAdmin.description: Apply for admin rights over zipcodes you already create polls in. Reviewed by a Super.

superAdmin.title: Super admin
superAdmin.description: Review admin requests, manage IP rules, edit poll templates, and oversee all admins.

guestResults.title: View poll results
guestResults.description: Browse every published poll and open its results page. No account required.

guestSignIn.title: Sign in
guestSignIn.description: Already have an account? We'll email you a one-time sign-in link.

guestRegister.title: Create an account
guestRegister.description: Email + phone + zipcode is all it takes. No passwords.

login.heading: Sign in
login.intro: Enter the email on your account and we'll send you a one-time sign-in link.
login.checkEmailBody: We've sent a one-time sign-in link to {email}. The link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.
login.errorNoAccount: We don't have an account for that email. Please register first.
login.errorGeneric: Could not send the sign-in link

register.heading: Create an account
register.intro: We use one-time email links instead of passwords. Enter your details and we'll send a sign-in link to your inbox.
register.checkEmailBody: We've sent a one-time sign-in link to {email}. Click the link to finish creating your account. The link expires in 15 minutes.
register.errorGeneric: Could not send the sign-in link

magicLink.errorExpired: This sign-in link has expired or has already been used. Request a new one.

search.guestIntroBefore: Search and view results for any published poll.

filters.zipcodeStartHint: Pick a state or start typing a zipcode here.
filters.zipcodeShiftHint: Shift+click for range • * select all • Shift+0 clear
filters.zipcodeHelp: Shift-* to select All..Shift-0 to de-select All, click on one zip and shift click 5 zips down to select a range

search.noMatches: No active polls match your filters.

election.wouldYouChange: Would you like to change your responses?
election.readonlyNote: Your previous votes are shown below. They cannot be modified here.
election.closedNote: This poll is no longer available for responses.

validation.yesNoFor: Please answer Yes or No for: {name}

questionnaire.wouldYouChange: Would you like to change your responses?
questionnaire.readonlyNote: Your previous responses are shown below. They cannot be modified here.
questionnaire.closedNote: This poll is no longer available for responses.

ballotMeasure.wouldYouChange: Would you like to change your response?
ballotMeasure.readonlyNote: Your previous response is shown below. It cannot be modified here.
ballotMeasure.closedNote: This poll is no longer available for responses.

dashboard.title: Creator Dashboard
dashboard.emptyDefault: You haven't created any polls yet.
dashboard.archiveConfirm: Archive "{title}"? This removes it from the dashboard, search, and voting. You can restore it later via "Show archived".

editPoll.heading: Edit Draft
editPoll.draftOnly: Only DRAFT polls can be edited.
editPoll.notSupported: Editing {type} polls is not supported yet.

form.title: Title
form.closeDateShort: This poll will close on {date}. Continue?

validation.completeCandidates: Add at least one complete candidate (name, affiliation, office)

election.candidatesHelp: Voters will mark Yes / No on each candidate.

ballotMeasure.noElections: You haven't created any Elections yet. Create one first, then attach a measure to it.

zipSetter.noCountiesSeeded: No counties seeded for this state yet. Pick a different state, or extend the seed data.

creatorRequest.heading: Creator Request
creatorRequest.submitted: Your request has been submitted. You'll receive an email once it has been reviewed.
creatorRequest.intro: Tell us where and what kind of polls you'd like to create. An admin will review your request.
creatorRequest.reasonPlaceholder: Why would you like to create polls in this area?
creatorRequest.errorNoPollType: Select at least one poll type

adminRequest.heading: Request Admin Access
adminRequest.submitted: Your request has been submitted. A Super will review it and you'll receive an email once it's processed.
adminRequest.intro: Pick the zipcodes you want to administer Creator Requests for. A Super will review your request.
adminRequest.reasonPlaceholder: Why would you like to be an admin in this area?
adminRequest.errorNoZipcode: Select at least one zipcode you want to administer

dashboard.heading: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.noPending: No pending requests in your scope.
dashboard.noDecisions: You haven't decided on any requests yet.
dashboard.qlManageCreatorsDesc: List, edit, and disable creators in your scope.
dashboard.qlRequestSuperDesc: Apply for additional admin / Super zipcodes.

dashboard.heading: Super Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: System-level controls.
dashboard.linksAdminRequestsDesc: Review and approve users requesting admin access.
dashboard.linksManageAdminsDesc: List current admins, toggle their zipcode assignments, demote.
dashboard.linksPollTemplatesDesc: Edit the JSON template for each poll type.
dashboard.linksManagePollsDesc: Edit title, summary, and close date on any poll, regardless of creator or status.
dashboard.noAssigned: No admins assigned to any pending requests.
dashboard.footnote: ⚠ flags admins whose pending share exceeds {threshold} (configurable via {key}).

manageAdmins.heading: Manage Admins
manageAdmins.demoteConfirm: Demote {email} to CREATOR? All their admin assignments will be disabled.

managePolls.heading: Manage All Polls
managePolls.subtitle: Super-admin override: change title, summary, and close date on any poll. Voter-facing structure (questions, candidates, geo scope) is locked once published.
managePolls.safeFieldsNote: Only title, summary, and close date can be changed here. Editing questions, candidates, or geo scope after publication would silently corrupt voter intent and is intentionally not exposed.

ipManagement.heading: IP Allow / Deny Rules
ipManagement.noteBody: these rules are stored but not enforced. Wiring up the request filter is intentionally deferred to avoid locking yourself out in dev.

pollTemplates.heading: Poll Type Templates
pollTemplates.intro: Edit the JSON template that defines what fields each poll type expects. Validation in the backend services is currently imperative — these templates are advisory until a schema-driven validator is wired up.
